info.description: Lightweight proxy core management panel for Xray, Sing-box, and Mihomo.
info.title: Isolate Panel API

get.description: Returns paginated audit log entries. Super-admin only.

post.description: Authenticate with username and password. If TOTP is enabled, provide totp_code as well. Returns requires_totp:true when TOTP code is missing.
Revoke the current refresh token
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token
Disable 2FA after verifying the admin password
Generate a new TOTP secret and provisioning URI. Call TOTPVerify after to activate.

get.description: Check if TOTP 2FA is enabled for the current admin account

post.description: Confirm the TOTP code from the authenticator app and activate 2FA

get.description: Returns all available backup files with metadata

post.description: Start a new AES-256-GCM encrypted backup of the database and core configurations

get.description: Returns current backup cron schedule and next scheduled run time

post.description: Set a cron expression for automatic backups (empty string to disable)

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific backup

delete.description: Delete a backup file and its record

get.description: Download a backup file as a binary stream

post.description: Restore database and configurations from a backup file

get.description: Returns all SSL/TLS certificates with current status

post.description: Request a new SSL/TLS certificate via Let's Encrypt ACME

get.description: Returns active/expiring certificates formatted for UI dropdown selectors

post.description: Upload a manually obtained certificate in PEM format

parameters.description: Certificate and private key in PEM format
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns a single certificate by ID with current status

delete.description: Delete a certificate record and its files

post.description: Force-renew a certificate via ACME (even if not yet expired)
Revoke a certificate via ACME and mark it as revoked

get.description: Returns all installed proxy cores with their running status
Returns status and info for a specific proxy core

post.description: Restart a proxy core (stop + start)
Start a proxy core via Supervisord

get.description: Returns detailed runtime status of a proxy core (PID, uptime, restarts)

post.description: Stop a running proxy core via Supervisord

get.description: Returns all available GeoSite category codes (cn, google, netflix, etc.)
Returns all available country codes for use in GeoIP routing rules
Returns available GeoIP/GeoSite database files and their last update time

post.description: Download latest GeoIP and GeoSite database files

get.description: Returns all inbounds, optionally filtered by core_id or is_enabled

post.description: Create a new proxy inbound (listener) on a core
Grant a user access to an inbound

get.description: Returns whether the given port is available or already in use

parameters.description: Inbound ID to exclude from conflict check
parameters.name: exclude_id

get.description: Returns all inbounds belonging to a specific core

post.description: Revoke a user's access to an inbound

get.description: Returns a single inbound by ID

put.description: Update inbound fields (partial update via map)

delete.description: Delete an inbound and remove all user assignments

get.description: Returns all users that have access to a specific inbound

post.description: Add or remove multiple users from an inbound in a single request

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated admin
Returns recent notification history
Returns current Telegram and Webhook notification configuration

put.description: Configure Telegram bot and Webhook URL, triggers, and enabled state

post.description: Send a test notification to configured channels to verify the integration

get.description: Returns a single notification event by ID

delete.description: Delete a notification event from history

get.description: Returns all outbounds, optionally filtered by core_id or protocol

post.description: Create a new proxy outbound routing rule

get.description: Returns a single outbound by ID
Returns all registered protocol schemas (25+ protocols). Filter by core or direction.
Returns the full parameter schema for a specific protocol (field types, validation, etc.)
Returns auto-generated default values for all protocol parameters (UUID, port, etc.)
Returns all key-value application settings

put.description: Update one or more application settings (key-value pairs)

get.description: Returns current monitoring mode (lite/full) and collection interval

put.description: Set monitoring mode to 'lite' (traffic only) or 'full' (traffic + connections)

get.description: Returns the current automatic traffic reset schedule (disabled/weekly/monthly)

put.description: Set automatic traffic reset schedule. Options: disabled, weekly (Mondays), monthly (1st of month)

get.description: Returns current active connections; filter by user_id to get user-specific connections
Returns summary stats: active connections, total users, traffic, running cores
Returns aggregated traffic data for all users over a time period (used by dashboard charts)
Returns users with the highest traffic consumption (used by dashboard top-users chart)

parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Close all active connections for a user (soft disconnect)
Force-remove a user from all proxy core inbounds (hard disconnect)

get.description: Returns per-day traffic statistics for a specific user
Get or create a short URL for a user's subscription link
Returns paginated list of all proxy users

post.description: Create a new proxy user

get.description: Returns a single user by ID

delete.description: Permanently delete a user and all associated data

get.description: Returns all inbounds assigned to a specific user

post.description: Generate a new UUID, password, and subscription token for the user
Generate a new subscription token for a user (old links become invalid)

get.description: Returns subscription URL access history for a user (client IPs, user-agents, formats)

parameters.description: Number of days to look back
parameters.name: days

get.description: Returns built-in WARP routing presets (bypass-cn, all-through-warp, etc.)

post.description: Apply a named WARP routing preset to a specific core
Register a new Cloudflare WARP device and generate WireGuard config

get.description: Returns all WARP routing rules for a specific core

post.description: Create a new WARP routing rule (domain, IP, or CIDR)

put.description: Update an existing WARP routing rule

get.description: Returns current Cloudflare WARP connection status

post.description: Regenerate core configs and reload to apply current WARP routes

parameters.description: Specific core ID to sync (omit to sync all)
parameters.name: core_id

code.description: country code (US, CN) or category (google, netflix)

email.description: Optional, uses service default if not provided

must_change_password.description: Whether the user must change their password before accessing other endpoints
